outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Day 33 — Trump says US could be done with Iran war in 2-3 weeks; no deal needed
outlets.summary: Trump says no deal needed to end war. WSJ: willing to leave without reopening Hormuz. Leavitt says private talks 'going well.'

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump to address nation after saying US may leave Iran war within weeks
outlets.summary: Trump to address nation Wed 9PM ET. Analyst Trita Parsi: 'The timeline just keeps on being extended because the US is no longer in control.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Watchdog blasts BBC, CNN, NYT for applying 'war crime' label almost exclusively to US, Israel
outlets.summary: CAMERA found 88% of 'war crime' label usage in mainstream media directed at US/Israel vs Iran. Pro-war media pushback.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: Iran threatens Nvidia, Apple and other tech giants with attack
outlets.summary: IRGC threatens 17 US tech companies with attacks if more Iranian leaders killed. Markets watching closely.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 33 of US-Israel attacks? Araghchi: prepared for 6 months
outlets.summary: Araghchi: trust at zero, prepared 6 months, Russia helping. Tanker hit off Qatar. Trump: no deal needed.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: BBC Verify links US PrSM munition to deadly Lamerd residential strike
outlets.summary: BBC Verify investigation identifies US Precision Strike Missile as weapon used in deadly attack on residential buildings in Lamerd, Iran.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IRGC fires 3 missile waves at Israel; 11-year-old critical; Hezbollah commander killed in Beirut
outlets.summary: Cluster missiles hit Bnei Brak, 16+ wounded. IDF killed Hezbollah Southern Front commander Hajj Yusuf Ismail Hashem.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Iranian missile barrage targets central Israel; 11-year-old girl in serious condition
outlets.summary: Details of 3-wave IRGC missile attack. Cluster munitions struck Bnei Brak residential areas. Child casualties.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Araghchi: Iran prepared for 6 months of war; ready for ground attack; Russia helping
outlets.summary: State media amplifies Araghchi's defiant Al Jazeera interview. Frames Iran as resolute despite US bombing campaign.

outlets.name: Tasnim News
outlets.headline: Araghchi slams Israeli strike on Tofigh Daru pharma firm, vows Iran's harsh response
outlets.summary: Iran FM condemns pharmaceutical factory destruction. Deputy Health Minister: total destruction of drug production. Iran calls it war crime.
